calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Petitioner: Racheal M. Fierros present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Rian Michael Fierros.
The Court further orders the GENDER of Rian Michael Fierros is changed from FEMALE to MALE.
Decree signed in open court.
